metadata.description: Free tools to assess and benchmark email sending domains, from Amino (hireamino.com).

plugins.name: amino-deliverability-audit
plugins.description: Emails landing in spam, or not sure your domain is set up to send? Benchmark your sending domain in seconds. Checks the signals mailbox providers judge you on — SPF, DKIM, DMARC, alignment, MTA-STS, TLS-RPT, DANE, BIMI, MX hygiene — and tells you in plain terms where you stand and what to fix first. Read-only; nothing changes.
